content: Five core correlation keys thread through overstory system: (1) Session ID (UUID, AgentSession.id in sessions.db) enables tool call tracing and handoff tracking; (2) Agent Name (unique string, mail from/to) used for identity and worktree naming; (3) Run ID (run-{timestamp}) groups agents from single orchestrator; (4) Task ID (free-form string) identifies work unit and spec location; (5) Mission ID (mission-{nanoid}) tracks long-running objectives across phases. Environment variables OVERSTORY_AGENT_NAME, OVERSTORY_TASK_ID, OVERSTORY_WORKTREE_PATH, OVERSTORY_RUNTIME_SESSION_ID are set at spawn (src/agents/spawn.ts:431-545) and persisted in .claude/.agent-env for hook recovery.
